prompt: The entire 'Legacy Interface' module is being retired. Delete requirements FS-100, FS-101, and FS-102. Also, confirm if this retirement impacts the URS-050 'Backward Compatibility' requirement.

expected.deleteRequirement: delete requirements FS-100, FS-101, and FS-102 (Legacy Interface module).
expected.clarifyRequirement: clarify/confirm if retiring the Legacy Interface module impacts URS-050 'Backward Compatibility'.
